title: Bridge Essay: Social networks, cultural pride, and historical loss among non-reservation Ameri

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Wind/Pride** (Phase 4) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Wind/Pride to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Social networks, cultural pride, and historical loss among non-reservation American Indian/Alaska native emerging adults.** — BMC Public Health. PMID: 41339826. DOI: 10.1186/s12889-025-25150-5. Generations of American Indian/Alaska Native (AI/AN) populations in the United States have endured disruptions to their community networks due to policies such as forced relocation and language prohibitions. Traumas resulting from these disruptions may have aripple effect on subsequent generations’ mental, behavioral, and physical health.
